description_long: This is a modern two-story bungalow with a flat, green roof featuring multiple levels and sections. The exterior is clad in light wood paneling, complemented by large, rectangular windows with dark brown frames. The front facade is adorned with lush landscaping and a small entryway, while the side yard includes a uniquely shaped swimming pool, a round patio umbrella, and several palm trees. A small balcony with a canopy is visible on the upper floor, providing an outdoor relaxation space. The overall design is open and airy, with a focus on blending natural elements and contemporary architecture. The structure is surrounded by minimalistic outdoor furniture and tropical vegetation, enhancing its resort-like ambiance.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with a flat green roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design blends wood paneling with contemporary outdoor elements.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, large windows, pool, patio umbrella, and palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flat green roof, upper balcony with canopy, and additional palm trees.
description_view_2: Left side view displaying the balcony, grouped windows, and more palm trees.
description_view_3: Front view with symmetrical windows, main entrance, landscaping, and a clear view of the pool and patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped large windows on both floors
